text: Bhai ko property mein bada hissa mila taaki wo apni nayi MNC wali lifestyle manage kar sake, par bade hone ke naate mujhe hi ghar aur office dono sambhalne hain. Main dual burden se itni thak chuki hoon ki aankhein band ho rahi hain, par main ruk nahi sakti kyunki poore parivaar ka bojh mere hi endurance par tika hai. Thakna mere liye ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakti.

Mummy-Papa ne saara batwara bhai ke haq mein kar diya taaki uska future secure rahe, aur mujhse umeed ki jati hai ki main working hokar bhi bina shikayat sab handle karun. Career mein suppressed ambition ka dard hai, par ab ghar aur saas-bahu dynamics ki zimmedari itni hai ki rone ka waqt bhi nahi milta. Mujhe bas chalte rehna hai kyunki mera rukna poore joint family ko bikhar dega.

Bhai ko jaydad milne par 'log kya kahenge' ki chinta mein main chup hoon aur office ke baad ghar ke kaamo mein din-raat ek kar rahi hoon. Main itni zyada exhaust ho chuki hoon ki lagta hai abhi gir jaungi, par bacchon ki padhai aur ghar ki 'izzat' ki wajah se 'cannot afford to stop' wali halat hai. Meri kurbani hi is parivaar ki structural stability banaye rakhegi.

Saas kehti hain ki bhai ko property dena hi sahi tha kyunki wahi khandaan ka naam aage badhayega, aur main unki baat maan kar office se aakar rasoi mein pis rahi hoon. Main mentally aur physically toot chuki hoon, par mujhe bhai ki shadi aur ghar ke kharche ke liye himmat jutani hi hogi. Rukne ka koi option nahi hai, yahi mera bade hone ka farz hai.

Bade hone ki yahi keemat hai ki bhai ko azadi mili aur mujhe sirf dual burden aur 'lost identity' ka bojh mila. Main poori tarah toot chuki hoon par parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye mujhe bina kisi break ke kaam karte rehna hai taaki bhai ka rasta saaf rahe. Mera kaam sirf endurance dikhana hai, chahe meri apni ambition kitni bhi kurban ho jaye.
